summary: CuentasAirtable layout (split-view Airtable-style module) - FULLY WORKING. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - toolbar, search, filters, directory grid, detail panel, tabs, URL state management, and pagination.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr>/<span> inside <tbody>. Console warning only, does not affect functionality. This is caused by development tooling wrapper elements.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list returns rows with total_rows, page, limit
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list row structure has id, nombre, ciudad, estado, last_purchase_date, days_since_last_purchase, sales_12m_amount, orders_12m_count
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list?q=angel search filter works (returned ~140 results)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list?estado=ACTIVO filter works
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list pagination works (page 1 vs page 2 have different rows)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list?sort=name&dir=asc/desc sorting works
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list/filter-options requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list/filter-options returns ciudades and asignados arrays
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id} requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id} returns cuenta with partner info
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id} creates cuenta on-demand if not exists
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/header-metrics requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/header-metrics returns last_purchase_date, days_since_last_purchase, sales_12m_amount, orders_12m_count
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/metrics requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/metrics returns orders_count, qty_total, last_order_date, first_order_date
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/orders requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/orders returns paginated orders with metrics
Backend: PUT /api/cuentas/{id} requires authentication (401)
Backend: PUT /api/cuentas/{id} updates estado_comercial
Backend: PUT /api/cuentas/{id} updates clasificacion
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/creditos/metrics requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/creditos/metrics returns data
Frontend: Login form works with data-testid attributes (login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn)
Frontend: /cuentas loads CuentasAirtable page with data-testid='cuentas-airtable'
Frontend: Toolbar shows search input (cuentas-search), filters (filter-estado, filter-clasificacion, filter-ciudad)
Frontend: Total count badge shows '11,022 cuentas'
Frontend: Directory grid shows columns: Cuenta, Ciudad, Estado, Ult. Compra, Dias, Vtas 12m, #
Frontend: Search for 'angel' filters to 140 cuentas
Frontend: Clicking account row shows detail panel with header (name, ACTIVO badge, KPIs)
Frontend: URL updates with ?selected={id} when clicking account row
Frontend: URL updates with &tab={tabname} when clicking tabs
Frontend: Resumen tab shows KPI cards (kpi-ventas, kpi-reservas, kpi-creditos, kpi-ultima-compra)
Frontend: Resumen tab shows quick links (quick-info_ventas, quick-yoy, quick-analitica, quick-interacciones, quick-tareas)
Frontend: Ventas tab shows orders table with Fecha, Orden, Estado, Qty, Total, Lineas columns
Frontend: Perfil tab shows form with Estado, Clasificacion, Asignado, Notas fields and Guardar button
Frontend: Pagination works - Pag 1/3 navigation with dir-prev-page, dir-next-page buttons
Frontend: URL updates to page=2 when clicking next page
critical_code_review_comments: CuentasAirtable.jsx: Well-structured split-view layout with proper URL state management using useSearchParams
CuentasAirtable.jsx: Good use of debounced search (300ms) via debounceRef in CuentasToolbar
CuentasAirtable.jsx: Proper handling of selectedId and activeTab from URL params
CuentasDirectoryGrid.jsx: Color-coded days badge (green <=7d, amber <=30d, red >30d) for quick visual status
CuentaDetailPanel.jsx: On-demand loading of cuenta and header-metrics with Promise.all for efficiency
server.py /api/cuentas/list: Batch computes KPIs only for current page (efficient - avoids full table scan)
server.py: Uses _get_cuenta_partner_ids helper to handle on-demand cuenta creation consistently
ResumenTab.jsx: Proper KPI cards that navigate to respective tabs when clicked
PerfilTab.jsx: Complete CRUD form for commercial data (estado, clasificacion, asignado, notas)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data from external Odoo database
context_for_next_testing_agent: CuentasAirtable split-view layout fully verified. Key endpoints: GET /api/cuentas/list (directory with pagination, search, filters, sorting), GET /api/cuentas/list/filter-options (dropdown values), GET /api/cuentas/{id} (detail with partner), GET /api/cuentas/{id}/header-metrics (compact KPIs), GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/metrics and /orders (sales data). All tabs working: Resumen (KPIs + quick links), Ventas (orders table), Perfil (edit form). URL state: ?q=search&estado=ACTIVO&selected=ID&tab=tabname&page=N. Minor React hydration warning in console is from dev tooling, not a bug. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_cuentas_airtable.py
